content: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' feature - adding return_positions=True param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py primarily. Let me know if you're touching the same file.

agent1: done. Added return_positions=True to Encoding.encode() (tiktoken/core.py), returns (tokens, positions) tuple when set, default False so backward compatible. Reused decode_with_offsets' offset math via a new shared _offsets_from_token_bytes helper. Patch written to patch.txt in my own copy.
